what_it_is: Standard mortgage for buying a home with competitive rates and terms
who_its_for: Buyers with solid credit and income documentation
key_benefit: Most flexible terms and lowest rates for qualified borrowers

what_it_is: Replace your current mortgage with a better rate or shorter term
who_its_for: Homeowners looking to lower their payment or pay off faster
key_benefit: Save money monthly or over the life of the loan

what_it_is: Government-backed loan with lower credit and down payment requirements
who_its_for: First-time buyers or those with limited savings and lower credit scores
key_benefit: Get into a home with as little as 3.5% down

what_it_is: Zero-down mortgage for military veterans and active-duty service members
who_its_for: Active military / veterans / eligible surviving spouses
key_benefit: No down payment and no PMI

what_it_is: Financing above standard conforming loan limits for higher-value properties
who_its_for: Buyers purchasing above conforming limits
key_benefit: Access to premium properties with competitive rates

what_it_is: Qualify using bank deposits instead of tax returns
who_its_for: Self-employed borrowers whose tax returns understate their actual income
key_benefit: No tax returns needed — we look at your real cash flow

what_it_is: Qualify based on the rental property income not your personal income
who_its_for: Real estate investors building or expanding rental portfolios
key_benefit: Your personal income doesnt matter — the property qualifies itself

what_it_is: Mortgage options for borrowers with an Individual Taxpayer ID Number
who_its_for: Non-citizen borrowers who file taxes with an ITIN
key_benefit: Homeownership access without a Social Security Number

what_it_is: Qualify using liquid assets rather than employment income
who_its_for: Retirees or high-net-worth individuals without traditional W2 income
key_benefit: Your assets work as your income

what_it_is: Special programs designed for medical professionals
who_its_for: Physicians and dentists with high student loan balances
key_benefit: Student debt treated differently — often more favorable qualification

what_it_is: Finance new construction or major renovations in one loan
who_its_for: Buyers building new or doing major rehab on a purchase
key_benefit: One loan covers purchase plus construction or renovation costs

what_it_is: Short-term financing to buy your next home before selling your current one
who_its_for: Homeowners who need to purchase before their current home sells
key_benefit: Buy first — sell later — without juggling two mortgages

what_it_is: Financing for manufactured and modular homes on land or in parks
who_its_for: Manufactured home buyers including chattel and park homes
key_benefit: More options than most lenders offer for manufactured housing

what_it_is: Access home equity without monthly payments for homeowners 62+
who_its_for: Homeowners 62 and older who want to tap equity or eliminate payments
key_benefit: No monthly mortgage payments — you stay in your home

what_it_is: Replace mortgage with larger one and receive equity difference in cash
who_its_for: Homeowners who want to access built-up equity for any purpose
key_benefit: Turn home equity into capital at mortgage rates

what_it_is: Revolving credit line secured by your home — draw as needed
who_its_for: Homeowners wanting flexible ongoing access to their equity
key_benefit: Only pay interest on what you actually use

what_it_is: Fixed-rate lump sum secured by home as a second lien
who_its_for: Homeowners wanting a specific amount at a fixed rate without refinancing
key_benefit: Fixed rate and payment — keeps your existing mortgage intact

what_it_is: Programs that help cover your down payment and closing costs
who_its_for: First-time buyers who need help with upfront costs
key_benefit: Grants or forgivable loans that reduce what you bring to closing

what_it_is: Oregon-specific state veteran loan program
who_its_for: Oregon veterans
key_benefit: State-level benefits that may differ from federal VA

what_it_is: Zero-down financing for homes in eligible rural and suburban areas
who_its_for: Buyers in eligible areas outside major metro centers
key_benefit: Zero down payment with low mortgage insurance
